site.title: Agent Showcase
site.subtitle: Agent evaluation and agent development case studies
site.summary: A compact entry point for two related interview showcases: one focuses on evaluating agent behavior under information gaps and execution constraints, the other focuses on building a task-authoring pipeline that turns messy real scripts into reusable eval tasks.

projects.title: Agent Evaluation Showcase
projects.description: A bilingual showcase covering information-gap handling, CLI execution discipline, and task delegation evaluation. The page consolidates rubric design, judge caveats, failure taxonomies, and concrete model comparisons.
points: Three evaluation tracks with detailed task framing
Human-readable failure taxonomies and improvement paths
Built from existing experiment results and audit artifacts

projects.title: Task Forge v2
projects.description: An agent-development showcase for a multi-step authoring pipeline that mines dirty Python scripts, routes them through critics, and assigns deterministic task buckets for downstream evaluation.
points: Workflow scaffolding plus four parallel critics
Artifact audit, runtime telemetry, and ablation evidence
